name: footer
title: Lumelle GlobalFooter
description: Centered brand-forward mobile footer with Lumelle L-mark SVG avatar, Playfair wordmark, 3-column icon link grid (Explore/Support/Newsletter), newsletter email capture form, social icons, and back-to-top button.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
